title: Furious (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Furious''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that saw service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Furious'' was on patrol in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] under orders to search any [[Starship/Legends|ships]] it encountered when it arrived at [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and interrupted a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Rescue mission to Mytus VII|raid]] to recover two escaped [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who had stowed away on the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Hampton]]''.

The ''Furious'' launched [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] along with [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|stormtrooper transports]] to recapture the freighter but Rebel [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] were able to hold off the Imperial forces long enough for their [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to complete the boarding operation. The ''Furious'' itself was unable to prevent the Rebels fleeing into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
